codeReview.summary: The implementation covers the core requirements: onboarding screen, profile form with name/bio fields, client-side validation, Zustand store, ProfileDisplay, and persistence via API client. Tests are comprehensive (14 ProfileForm tests, validators, OnboardingScreen, ProfileDisplay, HomePage). However, there is a critical bug in the profile store's `saveProfile` error handler that misclassifies failed saves as successful, and the edit mode flow is incomplete.

issues.description: In `saveProfile` catch block, on API error the status is set to `'loaded'` instead of `'error'`: `set({ error: message, status: 'loaded', isEditing: false })`. This means ProfileGateway will render HomePage (line 42: `status === 'loaded' && profile` check passes because `profile` is still set from before save) even though the save failed. The user sees the old profile data thinking save succeeded. Should be `status: 'error'`.

`cancelEditing()` only sets `isEditing: false` without storing or restoring previous profile values. When editing is cancelled, there's no way to restore the original form data. A proper cancel would need to store `previousProfile` on `startEditing()` and restore it on `cancelEditing()`.

ProfilePage component has 'Edit Profile' button that calls `startEditing()` and 'Reset Profile' button that calls `clearProfile()`, but there's no render logic that actually uses `isEditing` state to show a ProfileForm in edit mode. The ProfileForm supports `isEditMode` prop with appropriate labels and cancel button, but no component connects it. The edit feature is implemented at the component level but wired up at the page level.

`handleNameChange` calls `setErrors({})` which clears ALL errors, not just the name error. If bio validation is added in the future, changing the name input would clear any bio validation errors silently. Should be: `if (errors.name) setErrors(prev => ({ ...prev, name: undefined }));` or similar.

Google Fonts is loaded from https://fonts.googleapis.com, which violates AGENTS.md rule: 'External network calls (fully offline)'. This network call will fail in offline mode, and fonts will fall back to system defaults gracefully. Consider downloading font files locally to `public/fonts/`.

The skip button text says 'Skip for now' but ProfileForm doesn't have a skip/onSkip callback prop. The cancel button is reused for both edit mode ('Cancel') and create mode ('Skip for now') - in the current usage, OnboardingScreen passes onSubmit but no onCancel, so the skip button never renders. The user has no way to skip onboarding without filling the form.

`sanitizeProfile` trims `name` and `bio`. This function is not used anywhere in the current implementation. The form submission sends raw values to the store, which then sends to API without sanitization. Either use `sanitizeProfile` before API calls or remove the unused function.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Skill procedure step 4 requires running e2e tests and Playwright verification. The handoff shows only unit tests were run (npm run test). No playwright e2e tests were created. Agent-browser was used for manual interactive verification instead of automated e2e tests. The skill should be updated to allow agent-browser as an acceptable substitute for Playwright e2e when agent-browser is available.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript handoff shows commands: npm run typecheck, npm run lint, npm run test, npm run test:backend. No npm run test:e2e or playwright run. Interactive checks used agent-browser manually.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md states 'External network calls (fully offline)' but Google Fonts are loaded via external HTTPS URL. The team should decide whether to clarify that static CDNs (fonts) are acceptable vs. strictly offline.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: index.html:9-10 loads Google Fonts from fonts.googleapis.com and fonts.gstatic.com

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker created a Zustand profile store at src/stores/profileStore.ts with a complete CRUD lifecycle but did not document the store's state machine (loading -> not_found/loaded/error) in AGENTS.md or the library docs. Future workers implementing edit mode or profile reset will need to understand this state machine.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: ProfileState interface defines status: ProfileStatus = 'loading' | 'not_found' | 'loaded' | 'error' with transitions in saveProfile and loadProfile actions.

summary: The profile frontend feature implements core requirements: onboarding screen, profile form (name required + bio optional), client-side validation, Zustand store, ProfileDisplay, and API persistence. 38 frontend tests and 59 backend tests pass. However, there is a blocking bug in profileStore.ts where save errors incorrectly set status to 'loaded' instead of 'error', causing the UI to show the homepage even after a failed save. Additionally, the edit profile flow is incomplete — ProfileForm supports isEditMode but no page component connects it, and cancelEditing doesn't restore previous values. Minor issues include unused sanitizeProfile function, external Google Fonts violating offline-first constraint, and no automated e2e tests (manual agent-browser verification only).
